title: Honda Motorcycle India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Honda Motorcycle India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Honda Motorcycle India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Honda Motorcycle India:
Honda Motorcycle India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Honda Motorcycle India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
